title: Hydroglossum circinnatum
taxonomy: Hydroglossum circinnatum is classified as a species of fern in the family Osmundaceae. This classification indicates its close relationship with other ferns in the same family. Hydroglossum circinnatum is further grouped into the genus Hydroglossum. The species is also a part of the phylum Pteridophyta, which includes all types of ferns. In the kingdom Plantae, Hydroglossum circinnatum is a vascular plant.
uses: Hydroglossum circinnatum, also known as the circling tongue orchid, has been studied for its potential medicinal uses.
